entities.name: SWEET SORGHUM
entities.description: A SMART crop providing food, feed, and fuel, suitable for commercial ethanol production

entities.name: BIO-FUELS
entities.description: Energy sources developed to reduce reliance on fossil fuels and meet energy demands

entities.name: COMMERCIAL ETHANOL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The industrial process of converting feedstock like sweet sorghum into ethanol

entities.name: SUPPLY CHAIN MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The coordination of feedstock movement from farmers to distilleries in the ethanol value chain

entities.name: CENTRALIZED MODEL
entities.description: A supply chain approach where farmers deliver sweet sorghum stalks directly to a distillery

entities.name: DECENTRALIZED MODEL
entities.description: A supply chain approach where farmers deliver stalks to a village-level crushing unit

entities.name: DECENTRALIZED CRUSHING-SYRUP MAKING UNIT
entities.description: A facility that crushes sweet sorghum and produces storable concentrated syrup

entities.name: CONCENTRATED SYRUP
entities.description: A storable product derived from sweet sorghum juice used as feedstock for ethanol

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Crops, focusing on sweet sorghum supply chains

entities.name: DSR
entities.description: Directorate of Sorghum Research, focusing on sweet sorghum supply chains

entities.name: RAJENDRANAGAR
entities.description: The location of the Directorate of Sorghum Research in AP, India

entities.name: FOSSIL FUEL
entities.description: Traditional energy sources associated with environmental concerns
